title: Wrist / hand pain

red_flags.text: Identifies severe pain or swelling, discoloration, weakness, movement loss, numbness, coldness, deformity, persistent symptoms, fracture or dislocation concern, and clinician-selected radiography, ultrasound, or MRI.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped deformity, swelling, color, fever, movement, and neurovascular concern fields.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Identifies severe pain or swelling, discoloration, weakness, movement loss, numbness, coldness, deformity, persistent symptoms, fracture or dislocation concern, and clinician-selected radiography, ultrasound, or MRI.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47

red_flags.text: Supports clinician-documented RICE, activity protection, mobilization, analgesia, physical therapy, return to activity, one-week review, worsening review, and urgent escalation for severe, neurovascular, deformity, weight-bearing, fever, or hot-joint concerns.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-documented activity, bracing, analgesia, physiotherapy, and follow-up fields.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented RICE, activity protection, mobilization, analgesia, physical therapy, return to activity, one-week review, worsening review, and urgent escalation for severe, neurovascular, deformity, weight-bearing, fever, or hot-joint concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47

examination.text: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped wrist-sprain history, symptom, function, and examination fields.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47

investigations.text: Supports carpal-tunnel diagnostic terminology and clinician use of symptom-and-sign history within CTS-6, with selected ultrasound or electrodiagnostic testing when needed.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped adult carpal-tunnel terminology and symptom-and-sign diagnostic context without inferring a diagnosis.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports carpal-tunnel diagnostic terminology and clinician use of symptom-and-sign history within CTS-6, with selected ultrasound or electrodiagnostic testing when needed.

source.title: Management of Carpal Tunnel Syndrome Evidence-Based Clinical Practice Guideline

investigations.text: Covers non-complex fracture assessment and follow-up, repeated pain assessment, definitive X-ray reporting, Ottawa ankle and foot rules, and selected scaphoid imaging.
investigations.rationale: Reviewed for non-complex fracture assessment context; no wrist-specific rule components were mapped because the legacy fields were broader than the exact recommendation.
investigations.evidence_extract: Covers non-complex fracture assessment and follow-up, repeated pain assessment, definitive X-ray reporting, Ottawa ankle and foot rules, and selected scaphoid imaging.

treatment_and_management.text: Defines the current adult carpal-tunnel diagnostic and management population and confirms the 2024 guideline scope.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Reviewed to confirm the adult carpal-tunnel guideline population and boundaries; no legacy items were mapped from scope alone.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Defines the current adult carpal-tunnel diagnostic and management population and confirms the 2024 guideline scope.

source_limitations: Broad hand, finger, thumb, tenosynovitis, nocturnal symptom, open-wound, bilateral numbness, Tinel, Phalen, Finkelstein, snuffbox, and fixed two-week follow-up fields remain unsupported.
The combined carpal-tunnel or strain diagnosis label remains clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
